metadata.description: Marketplace for the JVM Pulse Copilot extension

plugins.name: jvm-pulse
plugins.description: Profile any Java project's garbage collection and flight-recorder telemetry inside Copilot: run a workload with GC logging + JFR, analyze it with GCToolkit and the jfr CLI, and visualize throughput, pauses, heap, allocations and hot methods in an interactive canvas.
